text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-600","children":"September 10, 2024"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"id":"content-wrapper","children":[["$","header",null,{"className":"mx-auto mb-16 mt-8 max-w-3xl px-4 lg:px-0","children":["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-center text-4xl font-semibold text-slate-900 dark:text-white","children":"Better security with Personal Access Tokens"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mx-auto mb-16 w-full max-w-screen-md","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"text-center","children":[" ",["$","iframe",null,{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/i51LPtagb2s","title":"Better security with Personal Access Tokens","width":"100%","allow":"accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; fullscreen","loading":"lazy","className":"mb-1 rounded-lg shadow-lg"}],null]}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mx-auto min-w-0 max-w-3xl flex-auto px-4 pb-24 lg:px-0 lg:pb-16","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"relative","children":["$","div",null,{"data-document":"main","className":"prose prose-lg prose-slate dark:prose-invert w-full max-w-none 2xl:max-w-4xl","children":["$","article",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["Today, Nx Cloud gets a huge upgrade to managing access to your cached artifacts"," ","using ",["$","$La",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/ci/features/remote-cache","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Nx Replay","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". Previously, workspaces"," ","were limited to defining access tokens with read or read/write permissions for an entire workspace. With the"," ","introduction of ",["$","em",null,{"children":"personal access tokens"}],", you gain much more control over access. This is a feature request we've heard"," ","from many customers, especially our ",["$","$La",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/enterprise","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Enterprise","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," customers, and we're happy to be able to deliver this"," ","enhancement."]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"access-tokens-and-the-problem-of-revoking-access","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Access Tokens and the problem of revoking access",["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#access-tokens-and-the-problem-of-revoking-access","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Our previous implementation of access tokens required you to commit the access token to your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx.json"}]," file. Typically,"," ","service providers don't recommend committing any kind of API token like this, and we've fielded a lot of questions about"," ","this practice in the past. It is safe to commit this token, as access to the cached artifacts of Nx Cloud rely on both"," ","the access token and the source code itself. Without access to both, you can't access the cache."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["However, this did present the following problem: revoking someone's access to the cache became difficult as long as they"," ","had the source code. Imagine a scenario where someone has left an organization. As long as they have a clone of the"," ","repo, they have everything they need to access the cache, even if their credentials have been"," ","revoked. To fully revoke"," ","their access would require cycling the access token, which could interrupt the work of other developers and CI"," ","pipelines."]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"access-tokens-become-ci-access-tokens","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Access Tokens become CI Access Tokens",["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#access-tokens-become-ci-access-tokens","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["What we previously called \"access tokens\" will now be called \"",["$","$La",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/ci/recipes/security/access-tokens","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"CI access tokens","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],".\""," ","They are still defined at the workspace"," ","level, but are designed for use in CI. These tokens should be set as environment variables or secrets on your CI"," ","platform so that they're no longer committed to your repo."]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"what-are-personal-access-tokens","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["What are personal access tokens?",["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#what-are-personal-access-tokens","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","$La",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/ci/recipes/security/personal-access-tokens","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Personal access tokens","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," are a new type of access token that is scoped to"," ","an individual user, rather than the workspace. This token authenticates the user with Nx Cloud when running tasks, so that we can validate their access to the distributed cache for a workspace. As soon as a user loses access to an Nx Cloud organization, they will no longer be able to access the cache for any of the organization's workspaces. The user's token belongs to them and will still allow access to their remaining organizations."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["This gets even more powerful when combined with the GitHub VCS integration. When a user's GitHub access is removed from"," ","a GitHub-connected organization, their access to your Nx Cloud organization is removed, and their access to the cache for any of the organization's workspaces is removed."," ","This means that Nx Cloud can fit into existing user de-provisioning processes you already have."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Open source teams also benefit from personal access tokens. You can configure your access to allow anonymous users to"," ","read from the cache, but limit read/write access to core contributors."]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"controlling-default-access","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Controlling default access",["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#controlling-default-access","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2024-09-10/workspace-settings.avif","alt":"Personal access token settings in Nx Cloud workspace","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["By default, a workspace that opts in to personal access tokens will allow anonymous users (users without a personal"," ","access token defined) read-write access. This can be changed to disallow access to the cache for anonymous users"," ","in your workspace settings."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Users with personal access tokens will also have read-write access to the cache. This can be changed to enable read-only"," ","access in the workspace settings."]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"converting-existing-workspaces-to-use-personal-access-tokens","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Converting existing workspaces to use personal access tokens",["$","$La",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#converting-existing-workspaces-to-use-personal-access-tokens","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Personal access tokens can be enabled with ",["$","em",null,{"children":"Nx versions 13+"}],". These steps will get you started, but you"," ","can ",["$","$La",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/ci/recipes/security/personal-access-tokens","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"find more details in our docs","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"."]}],["$","ol",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["Convert to using ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nxCloudId"}]," by running ",["$","code",null,{"children":"npx nx-cloud convert-to-nx-cloud-id"}]]}]," - Previously, your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx.json"}]," had a"," ","CI"," ","access token defined in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nxCloudAccessToken"}]," property. This command will replace that with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nxCloudId"}],", a generic"," ","id that references your workspace but no longer provides access to the cache."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["Generate a personal access token by running ",["$","code",null,{"children":"npx nx login"}]]}]," - Follow the directions in your terminal to log"," ","in"," ","to Nx Cloud. Each contributor with access to the workspace will need to complete this step."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Move CI access tokens to environment variables"}]," - Now that the access token is no longer committed to your"," ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx.json"}],","," ","you'll need to provide that CI access token via the"," ",["$","code",null,{"children":"NX_CLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN"}]," ",["$","$La",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/ci/reference/env-vars#nxcloudaccesstoken","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"environment variable","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":[["$","em",null,{"children":"Recommended"}]," Disable anonymous access"]}]," - By default, anyone without a personal access token will have read-write"," ","access"," ","to your cached artifacts. You can disable this anonymous access in"," ","your Nx Cloud workspace settings."]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","$La",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/ci/recipes/security/personal-access-tokens","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Learn
